atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for the last three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as especially when putting his hands over his head.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain is affecting his sleep.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness or tingling in his arm or fingers.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not taken anything for the pain recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: examiner
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: examiner
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's capillary refill is less than three seconds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: examiner
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The examination reveals tenderness of the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray of the shoulder was normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to a rotator cuff tendinopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor is referring the patient to physical therapy for approximately six to eight weeks.
